episodes.title: Exclusive: The Rancher Whose Family Sold Zorro Ranch to Jeffrey Epstein Speaks | EWTN News In Depth
episodes.description:
As the investigation into Jeffrey Epstein continues, Mark Irons speaks exclusively with a New Mexico rancher whose family sold "Zorro Ranch" to Epstein years ago. It's a remote and isolated site near Santa Fe where some Epstein victims say they were abused and trafficked years ago.

------------
Hosted by Catherine Hadro, EWTN News In Depth welcomes guests in a discussion of current events in the Church, politics, and culture, all through the lens of the Catholic faith.
This show is about finding out who we are as people and as Catholics, and how we can confidently live our faith in the world. It is produced by EWTN News: https://www.ewtnnews.com 
-------------
EWTN News In Depth airs on EWTN Fridays at 8pm ET. It re-airs on Saturdays at 1am ET & Sundays at 11am ET
